headline: Powerlaw Corp. (Nasdaq: PWRL) Highlights Groq Holding as Company Closes $650 Million Round
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, June 30, 2026--Powerlaw Corp. (Nasdaq: PWRL), a publicly traded closed-end fund advised by Powerlaw Fund Adviser, LLC, today highlighted its portfolio exposure to Groq following the company's new $650 million funding round as of June 22, 2026. The company was last valued at $6.9 billion, following a $750 million funding round in September 2025.
